utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six items explicitly with detailed subfields. Each section provides the expected details: property has type, location, price, and other characteristics; financing includes method, down payment, interest rate, and other costs; legal_services includes package name, cost, and included items; moving_services specifies service level, cost, and included tasks; setup_services lists utility package, cost, and optional features; total_budget includes all cost components and computations. All items are fully specified with appropriate details.
